name: SAP on Cloud
description: SAP Platinum Partner with SAP Activate certification: end-to-end hosting, migration, and operation of S/4HANA on private cloud, AWS, and Azure. RISE with SAP Premium Supplier with 4,000+ SAP experts and 850,000 managed SAP users.
positioning: The largest independent SAP managed services provider in Europe. Unmatched SAP operational scale combined with sovereign hosting options that hyperscalers cannot independently offer.
competitive_moat: 850k managed SAP users, Platinum Partner status, RISE with SAP Premium Supplier designation, European data residency
strategic_risk: SAP's own push toward BTP and hyperscaler-native RISE may disintermediate managed service providers over time
